title: Refactor JavaScript to TypeScript
original_text: Refactored codebase from JavaScript to TypeScript. Added type definitions for all modules. Implemented strict type checking. Added type guards for runtime validation. Migrated build system to handle TypeScript. Added type linting with ESLint. Added type tests with tsd. Updated documentation with type information. Result: 87 files migrated, type coverage 95%.
expected_body_lines: - Add type definitions for all modules
- Add type guards for runtime validation
- Add type linting and type tests
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(typescript): migrate JavaScript to TypeScript"
